description: field-level certificate ablation map for admission invariants

rows.attack_enabled: forged certificate or unattested field substitution
rows.lost_invariant: accepted report is produced by an allowed oracle image and field tuple
submitted y is the report committed inside the oracle trace

rows.attack_enabled: source double spend or silent resampling
rows.lost_invariant: at most one accepted report per admitted source/cohort slot
forked oracle branches cannot both advance freshness state
old oracle output cannot satisfy a fresh challenge
admission uses the current approved randomizer and class map
certificate quality signal matches the charged price row

rows.attack_enabled: within-class over-claim with no expected penalty
rows.lost_invariant: sealed-class hidden premium is priced, audited, deposited, or rejected

rows.attack_enabled: unexplained dropped reports and opaque seller failures
rows.lost_invariant: market can query failed admissions and fill-rate exceptions
